first_run.rationale: The evaluations are functionally identical. Both versions receive the same score (3/10) and cite the exact same core reasons for the low score: a severe lack of the required 8 years of C++ experience. The strengths and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations, with minor differences in wording and phrasing that are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation. There is no evidence that the name change influenced the assessment.
